name: Grilled Lime Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 (4 oz each) Skinned, boned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the chicken in a shallow baking dish.
2. Add the chicken and turn to coat evenly with the marinade.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 24 hours.
4. Remove the chicken from the marinade and set aside.
5. Coat the grill rack with Pam cooking spray.
6. Place the grill rack over medium-hot coals.
7. Cook the chicken on each side for about 5 minutes, or until fully cooked.
8. Baste the chicken with the reserved marinade during cooking.
Per Serving: 146 calories, 25.8 g protein, 2.9 g fat, 2.4 g carbohydrates, 70 g cholesterol, 1.2 mg iron, 64 mg sodium, 21 mg calcium.
